Code fragment: datasetStore.dsl().select().from(DATASET_METADATA).fetchMap(DATASET_METADATA.KEY, DATASET_METADATA.VALUE)
Explanation: Using `select()` without specifying columns fetches all columns from the DATASET_METADATA table, even though only KEY and VALUE are needed. Replace `select()` with `select(DATASET_METADATA.KEY, DATASET_METADATA.VALUE)` to fetch only the required columns.

Code fragment: .where(FARM_ANIMAL_CATEGORIES.CODE.containsIgnoreCase(animalCode.get()))
Explanation: Using `containsIgnoreCase` performs a case-insensitive substring search (LIKE '%value%'), which cannot use indexes efficiently and may cause performance issues on large datasets. Consider using exact matching with `.eq()` or `.equalIgnoreCase()`, or implement a proper full-text search solution if fuzzy matching is required.
